song.title: Unchanging God
song.lyrics: [V1] Faithful, in the waiting you are Always faithful In the valley you are Faithful, in the midst of hurt and pain…you are faithful [C] Your promises remain forever and ever You won't fade away, You never, You never Change, You're unchanging God You will never change, you're unchanging God [V2] Mighty in the battle You are Always with me You're the God who overcomes Mighty, you have raised me from the grave You are mighty [B] Your kingdom is forever Your love will last forever All glory, all honor, unto our God forever
song.author: Elevation Worship
